strategy: Keep an Aura on yourself at all times. If you start any round without one, she gives you a -200% Accuracy Aura for 99 rounds and you fizzle everything. Open round 1 with an Aura and never let it drop.
She recasts your Aura on you when you cast one, so refreshing is cheap; just make sure one is always active.
Do not Feint her: any Feint, Mass Feint included, triggers Camp Bandit. Use other traps or stack blades instead.
Attack with Myth, Life, or Death (+15%); she resists Balance 40% and hits for +150%, so shield up.
Handle the three Fonts and finish with a boosted hit while your Aura keeps your accuracy safe.
cheatNotes: If you start any round without an Aura, she gives you a -200% Accuracy Aura for 99 rounds. Keep an Aura up from round 1 on.
Astral or Shadow summoned minions get targeted but take no aura, since none exists for those schools.
Dual-school minions catch the -200% accuracy on their second school.
Casting an Aura makes her recast it on you, which is harmless and keeps you covered against the accuracy cheat.
Feinting her triggers Camp Bandit, so skip Feint entirely.
Mass Feint does not dodge it either, so use no Feint of any kind.
